strategy.name: Elder Santis — OrderFlow Supply & Demand Strategy
strategy.description: Multi-timeframe strategy using market structure, supply/demand zones, and order flow confirmation for high-probability entries.

step1_market_structure.description: Identify trend direction on the 4H timeframe BEFORE doing anything else.

bullish.definition: 3 higher highs and 2 higher lows on 4H

bearish.definition: 3 lower lows and 2 lower highs on 4H

balanced.definition: 3 equal highs and 3 equal lows on 4H

unclear.definition: Structure does not fit bullish, bearish, or balanced
unclear.action: DO NOT TRADE. Sit on hands and wait.

step2_supply_demand_zones.description: Draw key levels on the 30-minute timeframe only.
rules: Only mark OBVIOUS big and fast moves — if you are unsure, skip it
Cherry pick only the clearest levels

how_to_draw: Identify consolidation or neutral candle BEFORE the big move up
Bottom of box = bottom wick of consolidation candle
Top of box = top body of consolidation candle
Identify consolidation or neutral candle BEFORE the big move down
Top of box = top wick of consolidation candle
Bottom of box = bottom body of consolidation candle

step3_exit_plan.description: Know your exit BEFORE entering. Never adjust stop loss — only adjust entry and size.

stop_loss.longs: Place at the swing low — where thesis is invalid
stop_loss.shorts: Place at the swing high — where thesis is invalid
stop_loss.rule: Stop loss goes where thesis is INVALID — never based on dollar amount

risk_reward.minimum: 2:1 — distance to take profit must be DOUBLE distance to stop loss
risk_reward.rule: If setup does not offer 2:1 R:R — DO NOT TAKE THE TRADE

step4_five_minute_structure.description: Zoom into 5min after price taps key level. Wait for structure shift.

longs.required: Higher high AND higher low on 5min chart
longs.then: Look for order flow entry trigger at the higher low

shorts.required: Lower low AND lower high on 5min chart
shorts.then: Look for order flow entry trigger at the lower high

step5_order_flow_entry.description: Use Bookmap or footprint chart on 5min to confirm entry.

concepts.exhaustion: Aggressive buyers or sellers getting smaller and smaller until they disappear
concepts.absorption: Large passive order absorbs aggressive market orders with no follow-through

entry_long.step1: See seller exhaustion OR absorption at key level
entry_long.step2: Wait for aggressive buyer to fill a passive sell offer
entry_long.step3: See a bid printed ABOVE that fill

entry_short.step1: See buyer exhaustion OR absorption at key level
entry_short.step2: Wait for aggressive seller to fill a passive buy offer
entry_short.step3: See an offer printed BELOW that fill

golden_rules: RULE 1: If structure is unclear on 4H — DO NOT TRADE
RULE 2: Only trade OBVIOUS supply and demand levels — no maybes
RULE 3: Know your stop loss and take profit BEFORE entering
RULE 4: Stop loss goes where thesis is invalid — never based on dollar amount
RULE 5: Minimum 2:1 risk-to-reward on EVERY trade — no exceptions
RULE 6: Wait for 5min structure shift before looking for entry
RULE 7: Wait for order flow confirmation before pressing buy/sell
RULE 8: You only need 5 good trading days per month — quality over quantity
RULE 9: Be a hunter — patience and discipline make this strategy golden
RULE 10: Review and journal trades weekly

order_flow_tool.purpose: Read aggressive vs passive order flow for entry confirmation

trading_sessions.philosophy: Less is more — wait for A+ setups only
